overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man showing the character walking through a New York City street at night. The scene transitions from a park sidewalk to crossing intersections and walking down city streets, ending near a prominent gothic church with atmospheric steam vents.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk adjacent to fenced basketball court

events.description: civilian in gray hoodie passes close to camera on the right
Spider-Man turns slightly right toward the street crossing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along sidewalk next to chain-link fence, passing a civilian

notable_agents.action: civilian in gray hoodie walking past Spider-Man in opposite direction

entered.detail: tall metal fence surrounding outdoor basketball court
outdoor court with hoops visible through the fencing
curved low brick wall with black metal railing on top
deciduous trees with yellow-orange autumn foliage

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a city sidewalk at night, passing a civilian in a gray hoodie. To the left is a fenced basketball court, while the right side features a curved brick retaining wall and autumn trees with street lamps illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: city intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic

events.description: yellow taxi cab drives past on the right side of the street
Spider-Man steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the street at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk while looking up at the surrounding buildings

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab with illuminated roof sign driving along the street

entered.detail: classic NYC yellow taxi with checkered stripe and illuminated roof advertisement
ornate stone building with arched windows and green painted trim at street level
illuminated green traffic signal suspended over the intersection

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man approaches and crosses a city intersection at night. A yellow taxi passes by on the right while the camera captures a historic stone corner building with arched windows. The traffic light shows green as pedestrians cross the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with parked cars and storefronts

events.description: Spider-Man walks between moving vehicles including a blue sedan and white truck
white delivery truck drives past on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of the street between rows of parked cars and moving traffic

notable_agents.action: blue sedan with headlights on driving past Spider-Man

entered.detail: row of parked vehicles including a red sedan and silver SUV along the curb
building with green facade and illuminated shamrock signage
green and blue public recycling containers on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks down the middle of a city street at night, navigating between parked cars on the left and moving traffic. An Irish pub with green facade and shamrock signage is visible on the right, while various vehicles including a blue sedan pass by.

scene_state.functional_zone: street approaching gothic cathedral with atmospheric steam

events.description: large gothic church with tall spire comes into view dominating the skyline
Spider-Man looks up at the church spire while continuing to walk forward
steam vents from a white delivery truck create atmospheric fog near the church

agents.ego_description: walking toward the church and looking up at the illuminated spire, then passing through steam vents from a parked truck

entered.detail: large dark stone cathedral with tall pointed spire and illuminated stained glass windows
food service truck with circular logo and steam venting from the rear
white contemporary high-rise building visible behind the church

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man approaches a massive gothic church with a tall spire that dominates the skyline. He looks up at the illuminated stained glass windows while walking past a white delivery truck venting steam, creating an atmospheric fog effect on the street. A modern white skyscraper rises behind the historic church.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nocturnal New York City landscape that shifts from a quiet parkside walk to a dense, atmospheric urban center. It begins with Spider-Man walking along a sidewalk past a fenced basketball court and autumn trees illuminated by street lamps. As he reaches a city intersection, the camera tracks him crossing the street past a historic stone building while a yellow taxi drives by. The scene then opens up into the middle of a busy thoroughfare, navigating between parked cars and passing a green Irish pub with shamrock signage. Finally, the path leads toward a massive gothic church with a towering spire, where the camera tilts upward toward illuminated stained glass as the street fills with atmospheric steam from a nearby delivery truck.
